subject: fix(ui): increase all undersized touch targets across builder and dashboard
body:
- BuilderPage mobile Create button: py-1.5 text-xs (~24px) → py-2.5
  text-sm (~40px)
- BuilderPage mobile menu button: p-1.5 (~28px) → p-2.5 (~36px)
- BuilderCanvas mobile move up/down buttons: p-2 (~34px) → p-2.5 (~38px)
- BuilderCanvas duplicate button: p-2 → p-2.5 mobile, md:p-2 desktop
- BuilderCanvas remove button: p-2 → p-2.5 mobile, md:p-2 desktop
- PageTabs rename button: p-1.5 (~24px) → p-2 mobile, md:p-1.5 desktop
- PageTabs remove button: p-1.5 (~24px) → p-2 mobile, md:p-1.5 desktop
- ResponsesPage export button: py-1.5 (~28px) → py-2 (~36px)

All interactive elements now meet or approach WCAG 2.5.5 minimum (44px)
touch target size on mobile, with compact sizing preserved for desktop
via responsive md: prefixes.

Tags: accessibility, mobile, touch-targets
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-polish
Semver: patch
